nodes.name: White-striped forest rail
nodes.summary: The white-striped forest rail (Rallicula leucospila), also white-striped forest crake is a species of bird in the family Sarothruridae. It is endemic to West Papua, Indonesia. Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist montane forests. It is threatened by habitat loss. References

nodes.name: White-striped forest rail
nodes.summary: White-striped forest rail（Rallicula leucospila）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如White-striped forest rail。

nodes.name: Rallicula
nodes.summary: Rallicula（Rallicula）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联4种鸟类，如Chestnut forest rail、White-striped forest rail、Forbes's forest rail等4种鸟类。
